transcript:
CALLER: Hello, I have an appointment this evening with your neurologist but I'm not going to be able to make it. Can we move it?
AGENT: Of course, I understand. May I have your name and registered number?
CALLER: Siddharth Naik. 9867452301.
AGENT: Thank you. I can see your 5 PM appointment with Dr. Leena Verma. When would you like to reschedule?
CALLER: Umm, is next Saturday possible? Preferably morning.
AGENT: Dr. Verma unfortunately doesn't hold clinic on Saturdays. The next available slots are next Monday at 9 AM or Thursday at 4 PM.
CALLER: Okay, Thursday 4 PM then.
AGENT: Perfect. Rescheduled for Siddharth Naik, Thursday at 4 PM with Dr. Leena Verma. You'll receive an updated SMS. Is there anything else?
CALLER: No, that's fine. Thank you.
